EditTextPreference.title: SimpleFIN Token or Access URL
EditTextPreference.dialogMessage: Create a token at https://bridge.simplefin.org/simplefin/create and paste it here. A SimpleFIN Token can be claimed only once. You may also paste an existing SimpleFIN Access URL.

EditTextPreference.title: From what date to load transactions
EditTextPreference.dialogTitle: From what date to load transactions
